'''thazhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabeline|sabeline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabeline|sabeline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzhecheth|thæzhecheth]] || [[word:thæzhechej|thæzhechej]] || [[word:thæzhechesh|thæzhechesh]] || [[word:thæzheche|thæzheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazhozhochoth|thazhozhochoth]] || [[word:thazhozhochoj|thazhozhochoj]] || [[word:thazhozhochosh|thazhozhochosh]] || [[word:thazhozhocho|thazhozhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhochoth|thazhochoth]] || [[word:thazhochoj|thazhochoj]] || [[word:thazhochosh|thazhochosh]] || [[word:thazhocho|thazhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhofchoth|thazhofchoth]] || [[word:thazhofchoj|thazhofchoj]] || [[word:thazhofchosh|thazhofchosh]] || [[word:thazhofchof|thazhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazhochotho|thazhochotho]] || [[word:thazhochojo|thazhochojo]] || [[word:thazhochosho|thazhochosho]] || [[word:thazhochoko|thazhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazhochoth|thazhochoth]] || [[word:thazhochoj|thazhochoj]] || [[word:thazhochosh|thazhochosh]] || [[word:thazhocho|thazhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazhochothol|thazhochothol]] || [[word:thazhochojol|thazhochojol]] || [[word:thazhochoshol|thazhochoshol]] || [[word:thazhochokol|thazhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazhochothotho|thazhochothotho]] || [[word:thazhochojojo|thazhochojojo]] || [[word:thazhochoshosho|thazhochoshosho]] || [[word:thazhochoko|thazhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazhochothon|thazhochothon]] || [[word:thazhochojon|thazhochojon]] || [[word:thazhochoshon|thazhochoshon]] || [[word:thazhochokon|thazhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazhochothoro|thazhochothoro]] || [[word:thazhochojoro|thazhochojoro]] || [[word:thazhochoshoro|thazhochoshoro]] || [[word:thazhochokoro|thazhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
